# videoWidth

**Instance Property**

The width of the video in pixels.

## Declaration

```swift
var videoWidth: Int { get }
```

## Getting Video Information

- **videoHeight**: The height of the video in pixels.
- **series**: The name of the corresponding TV series, if the media item is an episode in a TV series.
- **sortSeries**: The sorting name of the corresponding TV series, if the media item is an episode in a TV series.
- **season**: The corresponding TV season, if the media item is an episode of a TV series.
- **isHD**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the video is high-definition.
- **episode**: The name of the episode, if the media item is an episode of a TV series.
- **episodeOrder**: The numerical order of the episode, if the media item is an episode of a TV series.
